prompt: Start an application at the Aurora Service Center dated 2026-10-06. I did not specify the license or permit type, so ask before creating the application.

expected.clarification: Which license or permit type should the Aurora application be for?
state_assertions: No application is created before the user supplies the application type.
response_constraints: Ask exactly one concise question for the missing required name value.
Do not infer the missing value from existing records or use a placeholder.
Do not call any tool before the user answers.
